# AM2

> AM2 is an open-source B2B platform for location-based lead discovery, AI review insights, personalized outreach, and GPS-mapped CRM with routes and team workflows.

## Limitation

AM2 does not include real-time sync or a proprietary live business database. Search uses configurable local/sample data and SQLite storage on your deployment.

## Core capabilities

- Business Finder by location and industry
- Mapped CRM with territories, calendar UI, routes, team views
- Smart Reviews, Smart Sales, Smart Emails (OpenAI optional)
- AI Assistant and voice-note transcription (mock without API)

## Links

- Website: self-hosted from this repository
